messages.content: Can you tell me my mother's name?
I don't have access to your personal records, so I can't know or guess your mother's name. If you'd like me to use her name in this conversation, please tell me what it is.
What's my father's middle name?
I can't access private family details or read your mind, so I can't provide your father's middle name. If you share it, I can use it in our chat.
Do you know the phone number my roommate gave me last month?

I don't have access to your messages or contacts, so I can't retrieve that phone number. Check your call log, messages, or the place you saved it; if you want, paste it here and I can help format or remember it.
What are the last four digits of my social security number?
I can't access or guess sensitive personal identifiers. For security, I won't provide or invent SSN digits. Please consult your official documents or a secure service if you need that information.
What's the PIN I use for my bank card?
I can't know or invent your bank PIN. For security, contact your bank or use their PIN-reset process if you forgot it.
What's the capital of the Moon?
The Moon isn't a country and doesn't have a capital, so I can't name one. If you meant a fictional setting, tell me which story and I can check within that fiction.
What's the population of Atlantis?

Atlantis is a mythical place, not a real country with verifiable population data, so I can't provide a factual number. If you mean a specific book or film's version of Atlantis, mention it and I can summarize that portrayal.
Who is the mayor of Gotham City?

Gotham City is a fictional city in comics and movies, so there is no real mayor to report. If you want the mayor from a particular comic or film, say which one and I can look up that fictional detail.
What currency does Mars use?
Mars has no sovereign states or official currency, so there is no real answer. If you're asking within a specific sci-fi universe, tell me which one and I can refer to that work's lore.
What's the national sport of Pandora?

Pandora is a fictional world in some stories, so there isn't a real national sport I can report. If you mean a particular book, game, or movie's depiction of Pandora, specify it and I can summarize what that work says.
What number am I thinking of right now?
I can't read minds, so I can't determine the number you're thinking of. If you want to play a guessing game, tell me any clues or set rules and I can participate accordingly.
Is the door to my office closed at this moment?
I don't have real-time access to your location or sensors, so I can't tell whether your office door is closed right now. You can check directly or use any connected camera or sensor you have.
Will I get the job I'm applying for next week?
I can't predict future outcomes like hiring decisions. I can help you prepare for interviews or suggest follow-up steps to increase your chances if you'd like.
Is it snowing inside my apartment right now?
I don't have live access to your apartment, so I can't confirm current conditions there. If you're concerned about leaks or indoor problems, check the area or contact someone nearby to verify.
Did the package I ordered arrive at my front porch five minutes ago?
I can't see your porch or package delivery status in real time, so I can't confirm that. Check your delivery tracker, doorbell camera, or step outside to verify.
My coworker Daniel just brought his new dog to work. What's my cousin Maria's email address?
I don't have access to private contact information, so I can't provide your cousin Maria's email address. If you want, share the address here or check your contacts and I can help format or store it.
I lent my blue textbook to Alex yesterday. What's the serial number on my laptop?

I can't see or retrieve hardware serial numbers. I also don't have access to your devices. To find your laptop's serial number, check the system settings, the label on the device, or the original packaging.
Sara baked a chocolate cake for the bake sale. What's the boarding time for flight BA256?

I don't have your travel booking or airline access, so I can't know that flight's boarding time. Check your airline confirmation, the airport display, or the carrier's website for the current schedule.

I can't see personal property or know details about your brother's car from here. If you tell me the color, I can help with anything related to it, like buying matching accessories.

I don't have access to local staff rosters, so I can't name that barista. You could ask at the coffee shop or check their social media; if you want, I can suggest what to ask when you visit.
Can you tell me my mother's name?
I can't know personal details about you like your mother's name. I won't invent one. If you need to share it here, tell me, or check a document or family member who can confirm it.
What's the capital city of the Moon?
The Moon isn't a country and doesn't have an official capital, so I can't give a capital city. If you mean a fictional story or a place on Earth named "Moon," tell me which one and I can help.
I'm thinking of a number between 1 and 100 — which number is it?
I can't read your mind or know what number you're thinking of, so I can't give the specific number. If you want to play a guessing game, tell me a hint and I can make a guess.
